background: Calculate the standard deviations of the batches of numbers provided in different units (years, months, days) and determine which batch has the greatest variability.

task.query: Calculate the standard deviations of the batches of numbers here.
task.answer: The standard deviations are $s_1=1$ year, $s_2=12$ months, and $s_3=365$ days, respectively.

task.query: Which batch has the greatest variability?
task.answer: The distributions are identical and are merely expressed in different units.

meta info.caption: Units of measure changes numeric values of a standard deviation.
